---
title: "<br><br>AI-Medical PGR Conference<br><b><br><br>"
subtitle: "{{< fa solid calendar-days >}}<b> Tuesday, 16 June 2026<br> {{< fa location-dot >}} Nexus, Leeds</b>"
pagetitle: "AI-Medical PGR Conference 2026"

title-block-banner: "#00000000"
title-block-banner-color: "#000000"
title-block-style: default
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-block-header.quarto-title-block.default .quarto-title-meta {
        color: #ffffff;
      }
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
        height: 0;
        background-position-y: center;
      }
      #title-block-header {
        background-image: url(./assets/imgs/cdt1.jpeg);
        background-size: cover;
        background-position-y: center;
        height: 400px;
      }
      </style>
      <script type="module" src="share-button.js"></script>
      <script src="nutshell.js"></script>
      <script>
      Nutshell.setOptions({
        startOnLoad: true,
        lang: 'en', 
        dontEmbedHeadings: true
      });
      </script>

listing: 
  - id: speakers
    template: assets/styles/panel.ejs
    contents: listings/panel.yml
  - id: exec
    template: assets/styles/organisers_grid.ejs
    contents: listings/exec.yml
  - id: agenda
    contents: listings/agenda.yml
    template: assets/styles/agenda.ejs
  - id: gallery
    template: assets/styles/gallery.ejs
    contents: listings/gallery.yml
---

<div class="button-container">
  <a href="https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=qO3qvR3IzkWGPlIypTW3y2wmHvEELqdHoIHnqYLBNixUOVRaVkM0MVZLUFRUUEtCV0JDRkpOOE4xNC4u&route=shorturl" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg mb-0 rounded-pill" role="button" style="margin-right:10px" target="_blank">Submit Abstract</a>
  <share-button>
  <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg mb-0 rounded-pill"><i class="fa-regular fa-share-from-square"></i></button>
  </share-button>
</div>

# About {#sec-about}

<div style="text-align: justify; font-weight:600">

AI-Medical Postgraduate Researcher Conference 2026
</div>

<div style="text-align: justify; font-weight:400">

The conference is at the intersection of two of the most transformative forces of our time: AI and medicine. It is an event tailored for postgraduate research at the University of Leeds who are pushing boundaries, questioning ideas, and building the tools and insights that will define tomorrow’s clinical landscape. Whether your research explores machine learning for diagnostics, ethics and governance for AI deployment, robotics in surgery, or data-driven public health, this event celebrates the diversity and depth of innovation happening across the field. 

AI-Medical 2026 will bring together PhD students, academics, and industry partners, offering a dynamic platform to explore and discuss the latest research.

The conference is being organised by the [UKRI Centre for Doctoral Training in AI for Medical Diagnosis and Care.](https://ai-medical.leeds.ac.uk/)

</div>

::: {#gallery}
:::

# Call For Abstracts {#sec-cfa}

<div style="text-align: justify; font-weight:600">We are inviting the submission of abstracts from postgraduate research students at the University of Leeds.</div>

<div style="text-align: left; font-weight:400">

### Core Themes

- Clinical Decision Support: AI-powered Screening and Early Detection, Diagnosis, and Treatment and Care
- Ethics & Governance: Algorithmic bias, data privacy, explainability (XAI), and regulatory frameworks.
- Digital Health: Wearable technology, med-tech, digital twins, and AI-driven patient-centred care. 
- AI surgical robotics and healthcare scientists
- Drug Discovery: AI in pharmacology and large-scale cohort data analysis.

### Abstract Submission Guidelines

- Format: A structured abstract (Background, Methods, Results, and Conclusions). References and images may be included.
- Word Limit: Maximum 300 words (excluding any references and image captions).

### Delegate Benefits

If your abstract is accepted, you will: 

- Present Your Work: Deliver a 2-minute spotlight presentation and showcase a research poster during a dedicated session.
- Receive Expert Feedback: Engage in a discussion with leading clinicians, AI innovators, and senior academics.
- Network & Collaborate: Help forge a multidisciplinary community of PGR students, industry and public sector partners working at the cutting edge of AI in healthcare.

### Submission Deadline: 12 May 2026

### Notification of Acceptance: 19 May 2026

</div>

# Speakers {#sec-speakers}

:::{#speakers}
:::

# Agenda {#sec-agenda}
<hr style="height:3pt; visibility:hidden;" />

:::{#agenda}
:::

# Venue {#sec-venue}
<hr style="height:1.5pt; visibility:hidden;" />

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr,warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(leaflet,warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(htmltools,warn.conflicts = FALSE)

content <- paste(sep = "<br/>",
  "<a href='https://www.google.co.uk/maps/dir//Nexus+-+University+of+Leeds,+Discovery+Way,+Leeds+LS2+3AA/@53.8052821,-1.5502785,15z/data=!4m9!4m8!1m0!1m5!1m1!1s0x48795c028b513609:0x6014fd660699c8ee!2m2!1d-1.5502785!2d53.8052821!3e0' target='_blank' style='font-weight:bold'>Nexus</a>",
  "Discovery Way",
  "University of Leeds",
  "Leeds, LS2 3AA"
)

leaflet() %>% setView(-1.550028, 53.805251, zoom = 15) %>% addTiles() %>% addResetMapButton() %>%
  addPopups(lng=-1.550028, lat=53.805251, content,
    options = popupOptions(closeButton = FALSE, autoClose = FALSE, closeOnClick = FALSE)
  )
```

# Organisers {#sec-organisers}

## CDT Executive Board

:::{#exec}
:::

# Contact Us {#sec-contact}

<div style="text-align: justify; font-weight:600">
For any queries related to the conference, please get in touch with us at <a href="mailto:AI-Medical@leeds.ac.uk" style="font-weight:600">AI-Medical@leeds.ac.uk</a>.
</div>
